Hydroplanes are [[memes]] which act as [[Psychohazards]] by perverting [[Firmlaw]].

Hydroplanes cause [[hydroplaning]] and are often quite insidious

Each hydroplane as a [[Patient Zero]] which it started in.

The concept is linked to heresy, but it is intended in a different way. Hydroplanes are [[memetic viruses]] and believing in them is not a product of a bad character. Patient Zero is not a heresiarch because they are merely the person the mutation occurred in, they are a victim as with every other patient

== Examples ==

* [[Pauline Christianity]]
*[[Enlightenment]]
* [[Perfect Access]]
* [[Romanticism]]
* [[Anti-organizationalism]]
* [[Neo-Calvinism]]
* [[Incel ideology]]

[[Category:Hydroplanes]]
[[sn:Hydroplane]][[sn:Hydroplane]][[Category:Psychohazards]]
[[sn:Hydroplane]][[Category:Memetic viruses]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Hydroplane]]
[[Category:Pages]]
